videos.title: HTML Paragraphs and Text - Web Dev Simplified
videos.description: Learn how to use HTML paragraphs, line breaks, and preformatted text to structure your content effectively.

videos.title: CSS Typography Fundamentals
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains CSS typography including line-height, text-align, and font properties that affect paragraph rendering.

videos.title: HTML Crash Course - Paragraphs & Text Elements
videos.description: Brad Traversy covers paragraphs, text formatting, and block vs inline elements in this HTML crash course section.

videos.title: Readable Typography for Web Developers
videos.description: A guide to creating readable text on the web, including paragraph spacing, font choices, and line length.

videos.title: CSS Text Properties - Complete Guide
videos.description: A comprehensive tutorial covering CSS text properties that affect paragraph styling including text-align, text-indent, and word-spacing.
